title: PROBLEM GAMBLING TREATMENT - 211info
text: OUTPATIENT CLINIC PROBLEM GAMBLING TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment for problem gambling. Offers residential and outpatient services with an option for telehealth. 750 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Email (503) 363-2021 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 363-2021 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and private pay DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus line 13 nearby Services: Gambling Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MENTAL HEALTH AND CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
